title: Uruguayan Creamy Potato Bake
description: A comforting, creamy potato bake with a Uruguayan twist. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes and melted butter. Toss to coat.
In a separate bowl, mix together creamy sauce, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange a layer of potatoes.
Spread half of the creamy sauce mixture over the potatoes.
Sprinkle half of the cheddar cheese over the sauce.
Repeat the layers, starting with the potatoes, then the remaining creamy sauce mixture, and finally the remaining cheddar cheese.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
